headline: First Solar Confronts Shrinking Backlog And Expiring Tax Credits Risk
summary: First Solar (NasdaqGS:FSLR) is seeing its order backlog run down quickly, with net bookings for 2025 turning negative. The company’s profitability is heavily tied to U.S. tax credits that are currently scheduled to phase out between 2030 and 2033. This mix of a shrinking backlog and expiring incentives raises questions about the durability of First Solar’s current business model. First Solar builds solar modules and sells long term contracts into utility scale projects, a part of the market...
